title: Robustly Grilled Japanese Chicken Skewers
description: A peppery and crunchy Japanese dish featuring mint, perfect for a sick day, and flexitarian-friendly, these chicken skewers are a delicious and healthy option.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, grated ginger, and black pepper.
Add the chopped mint leaves to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional mint leaves and serve with steamed vegetables or rice.
